ast.name: desc
ast.source: The name of the MCP server

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
JSON configuration that defines how to run the MCP server. Format must include:
- "command": The executable name (e.g., "npx", "node")
- "args": (Optional) Array of command-line arguments
- "env": (Optional) Key-value pairs of environment variables
ast.target:
用于定义如何运行 MCP 服务器的 JSON 配置。格式必须包含：
- "command"：可执行文件名称（例如 "npx"、"node"）
- "args"：（可选）命令行参数数组
- "env"：（可选）环境变量的键值对

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose the model you want to use for chat.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose the model you want to use for apply feature.
ast.target: 选择用于应用功能的模型。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This prompt will be added to the beginning of every chat.
ast.target: 此提示将添加到每次聊天的开头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically include the content of your current file in chats.
ast.target: 在聊天中自动包含当前文件的内容。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Allow the AI to use MCP tools.
ast.target: 允许 AI 使用 MCP 工具。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Maximum number of consecutive tool calls that can be made automatically without user confirmation. Higher values can significantly increase costs as each tool call consumes additional tokens.
ast.target: 无需用户确认即可自动连续调用工具的最大次数。数值越高会显著增加成本，因为每次工具调用都会消耗额外的 token。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Reset all settings to default values
ast.target: 将所有设置重置为默认值

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose an ID to identify this model in your settings. This is just for your reference.
ast.target: 选择一个 ID 以在设置中标识此模型。仅供参考。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable reasoning for the model. Available for o-series models (e.g., o3, o4-mini) and GPT-5 models.
ast.target: 为模型启用推理。适用于 o 系列模型（如 o3、o4-mini）和 GPT-5 模型。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Controls how much thinking the model does before responding. Default is "medium".
ast.target: 控制模型在回应前的思考程度。默认值为“medium”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Controls how much thinking the model does before responding.
ast.target: 控制模型在回应前的思考程度。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable extended thinking for Claude. Available for Claude Sonnet 3.7+ and Claude Opus 4.0+.
ast.target: 为 Claude 启用扩展思考。适用于 Claude Sonnet 3.7+ 和 Claude Opus 4.0+。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The maximum number of tokens that Claude can use for thinking. Must be at least 1024.
ast.target: Claude 用于思考的最大 token 数。至少为 1024。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Token budget for thinking. Use -1 for dynamic, 0 to disable.
ast.target: 思考的 token 预算。-1 表示动态，0 表示禁用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Shows a summary of the model's reasoning process. Enabling this can increase token usage.
ast.target: 显示模型推理过程的摘要。启用此功能可能会增加令牌使用量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Determines how much search context is retrieved for the model. Choose "low" for minimal context and lower costs, "medium" for a balanced approach, or "high" for maximum context at higher cost. Default is "low".
ast.target: 决定为模型检索多少搜索上下文。选择“low”以获得最少上下文并降低成本，选择“medium”以获得平衡方案，或选择“high”以获得最多上下文但成本更高。默认值为“low”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Login to Claude Code in your browser.
ast.target: 在浏览器中登录 Claude Code。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Paste the code from the redirected URL.
ast.target: 粘贴重定向 URL 中的代码。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Login to Google in your browser. Smart Composer connects automatically when you return.
ast.target: 在浏览器中登录 Google。返回时 Smart Composer 会自动连接。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Use this only if automatic connect fails. Paste the full redirect URL from your browser address bar.
ast.target: 仅在自动连接失败时使用此项。从浏览器地址栏粘贴完整的重定向 URL。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Login to OpenAI in your browser. Smart Composer connects automatically when you return.
ast.target: 在浏览器中登录 OpenAI。返回时 Smart Composer 会自动连接。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose an ID to identify this provider in your settings. This is just for your reference.
ast.target: 选择一个 ID 以便在设置中识别此提供商。仅供参考。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Set the chunk size for text splitting. After changing this, please re-index the vault using the 'Rebuild entire vault index' command.
ast.target: 设置文本拆分的分块大小。更改后，请使用“Rebuild entire vault index”命令重新索引库。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Maximum number of tokens before switching to RAG. If the total tokens from mentioned files exceed this, RAG will be used instead of including all file contents.
ast.target: 切换到 RAG 前的最大 token 数量。如果提到的文件的 token 总数超过此值，将使用 RAG 而不是包含所有文件内容。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Minimum similarity score for RAG results. Higher values return more relevant but potentially fewer results.
ast.target: RAG 结果的最小相似度分数。数值越高，结果越相关，但数量可能更少。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Maximum number of RAG results to include in the prompt. Higher values provide more context but increase token usage.
ast.target: 提示中包含的 RAG 结果最大数量。数值越高，提供的上下文越多，但会增加 token 使用量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If you find Smart Composer valuable, consider supporting its development!
ast.target: 如果你觉得 Smart Composer 很有价值，欢迎支持其开发！
